description: RANK() and DENSE_RANK() window functions return i64 non-nullable
name: window_rank_dense_rank
query_sql:
-- @name RankDenseRankSales
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, amount, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY amount DESC) AS rnk, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY amount DESC) AS drnk FROM sales
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE sales (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, employee_id INTEGER NOT NULL, department TEXT NOT NULL, amount INTEGER NOT NULL, sale_date DATE NOT NULL);
